checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: Issue 138 follows the established post-merge closure pattern. PR 135 and PR 137 merged. Issue-134 run artifact updated with successful combined apply-mode result. Issue-134 scope marked completed. Closure evidence created.

checked_dimensions.evidence: Run artifact updated: current_branch=codex/issue134-combined-demo-execution, pr_number=137, status=success. Evidence file has pr_merged=true. Closure.json records combined apply-mode success. Issue-134 scope status=completed. CURRENT_GOAL and README updated. All validators pass.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries

checked_dimensions.evidence: All changed files within declared exclusive_write scope. No protected paths touched.

checked_dimensions.evidence: All validators passed locally. No test code changes in this closure.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: GitHub CI is pending for the issue 138 PR and remains an external merge gate. Final report marks CI as not_collected.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: Final report accurately records combined apply-mode demonstration complete. PR 137 opened and merged by single apply-mode call. Issue 134 closed. Completion status is complete_pending_pr_ci.

findings.evidence: The successful combined apply-mode run (PR 137) was captured in stdout only — not written to the run artifact file by the script. The closure task updates the run artifact manually to preserve the evidence record. Git history preserves the prior failed-attempt version.
findings.recommendation: No action required. Manual update is acceptable for closure evidence.

unresolved_risks: GitHub CI and PR merge pending for issue 138 branch.
